signal_title: Estatuto Digital da Criança e do Adolescente (ECA Digital)
risk_rationale: The ECA Digital introduces new requirements for age verification and parental control tools that are not fully aligned with TikTok's current baseline, posing a material compliance gap that requires immediate product changes.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: TikTok states it uses machine learning and safety review to identify likely under-13 users and remove/limit access.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The current age assurance posture relies on machine learning, which may not meet the 'reliable' standard set by the ECA Digital.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Parent can view teen follower/following context and blocked-account settings.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The ECA Digital requires comprehensive parental control tools, which may exceed the current capabilities offered by TikTok's Family Pairing feature.

remediations.title: Enhance Age Verification Mechanisms
remediations.description: Develop and implement a more robust age verification system that meets the 'reliable' standard set by the ECA Digital.
acceptance_criteria: Age verification system is implemented and operational
System meets regulatory standards for reliability

remediations.title: Expand Parental Control Tools
remediations.description: Enhance the Family Pairing feature to include more comprehensive parental control tools as required by the ECA Digital.
acceptance_criteria: Parental control tools are expanded and meet regulatory requirements
Tools are user-friendly and accessible to parents

business_impact: Failure to comply with the ECA Digital could result in significant fines and restrictions on TikTok's operations in Brazil, affecting user growth and engagement.
recommended_actions: Initiate a cross-functional task force to address compliance with the ECA Digital.
Prioritize development of enhanced age verification and parental control tools.
Engage with Brazilian regulators to ensure alignment and address any compliance concerns.
